metadata.title: Translate
metadata.description: Translate text and notes with Google Translate, DeepL, Azure, and more.

regex.target: description:"为全局命令选择可用语言"

an entry will be added or updated for the reverse language pair as well"

description:"安装 Bergamot 翻译引擎（大小：5.00MiB）"

regex.source: description:"If applicable, set the issue region of the API key"

regex.target: description:"确保翻译服务设置正确"

regex.target: description:"用户停止键入后多久应执行翻译（以毫秒为单位）"

regex.source: text:"Disabling this setting might introduce some visual bugs"
regex.target: text:"禁用此设置可能会引入一些视觉错误"

regex.source: text:"Useful for sharing a screenshot of your settings without showing the secret data"
regex.target: text:"可用于共享设置的屏幕截图，而不显示秘密数据"

regex.source: text:"Setting applies to global commands (e.g. translating selections) and to newly opened translation views"
regex.target: text:"设置适用于全局命令（例如翻译选择）和新打开的翻译视图"

regex.source: text:"This option requires FastText to resolve the language of the input text"
regex.target: text:"此选项需要FastText来解析输入文本的语言"

regex.source: text:"Used for the editor context menu and translating files"
regex.target: text:"用于编辑器上下文菜单和翻译文件"

regex.source: text:"If the online glossary does not support a specific language pair, or if the service does not support online glossaries at all, glossary entries can be applied locally if `Local Glossary` setting is enabled"
regex.target: text:"If the online glossary does not support a specific language pair, or if the service does not support online glossaries at all, glossary entries can be applied locally if `Local Glossary` setting is enabled"

regex.source: text:"Automatic language detection is disabled, install FastText to enable this feature"
regex.target: text:"自动语言检测已禁用，请安装FastText以启用此功能"

regex.source: text:"Disclaimer: The engine was recompiled by me to a newer version, as no up-to-date official binary is available"
regex.target: text:"免责声明：由于没有最新的官方二进制文件，我将引擎重新编译为较新版本"

regex.source: text:"\u24D8 Sign up for an API key here"
text:"\u24D8 You can host this service locally"
regex.target: text:"\u24D8 您可以在本地托管此服务"

regex.source: text:"\u24D8 GPT-4 can be more expensive but result in more accurate translations"
regex.target: text:"\u24D8 GPT-4可能更贵，但翻译更准确"
text:"根据标点符号拆分句子"
text:"并非所有语言都支持形式"

regex.source: text:"May result in the character quota of the service being spent more quickly"
regex.target: text:"可能导致服务的字符配额更快地被消耗"
